chrome.name: Chrome
chrome.linux: wget -q -O - https://dl.google.com/linux/linux_signing_key.pub | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/google-chrome.gpg && echo 'deb [arch=amd64 signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/google-chrome.gpg] http://dl.google.com/linux/chrome/deb/ stable main' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/google-chrome.list && sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y google-chrome-stable

edge.name: Edge
edge.linux: curl -fsSL https://packages.microsoft.com/keys/microsoft.asc | gpg --dearmor > /tmp/microsoft.gpg && sudo install -o root -g root -m 644 /tmp/microsoft.gpg /usr/share/keyrings/ && echo 'deb [arch=amd64 signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/microsoft.gpg] https://packages.microsoft.com/repos/edge stable main' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/microsoft-edge-dev.list && sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y microsoft-edge-stable

jetbrains-toolbox.name: JetBrains Toolbox
jetbrains-toolbox.desc: JetBrains 全家桶管理/JetBrains suite manager

nodejs.name: Node.js
nodejs.linux: curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_lts.x | sudo -E bash - && sudo apt install -y nodejs

python.desc: Python 编程语言/Python programming language

go.desc: Go 编程语言/Go programming language

docker.linux_pacman: sudo pacman -S docker && sudo systemctl enable --now docker

spotify.name: Spotify
spotify.linux: curl -sS https://download.spotify.com/debian/pubkey_6224F9941A8AA6D1.gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor --yes -o /etc/apt/keyrings/spotify.gpg && echo 'deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/spotify.gpg] http://repository.spotify.com stable non-free' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/spotify.list && sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y spotify-client

brave.name: Brave
brave.linux: curl -fsSL https://brave-browser-apt-release.s3.brave.com/brave-browser-archive-keyring.gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/brave-browser-archive-keyring.gpg && echo 'deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/brave-browser-archive-keyring.gpg arch=amd64] https://brave-browser-apt-release.s3.brave.com/ stable main' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/brave-browser-release.list && sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y brave-browser
brave.linux_dnf: sudo dnf install -y dnf-plugins-core && sudo dnf config-manager --addrepo https://brave-browser-rpm-release.s3.brave.com/brave-browser.repo && sudo dnf install -y brave-browser
